use rayon::prelude::*;

// BAD: sequential collect then immediate par_iter
fn process_entries(dir: &Path) -> Vec<Output> {
    let entries: Vec<DirEntry> = std::fs::read_dir(dir)
        .unwrap()
        .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
        .collect();

    entries.par_iter()
        .map(|entry| process_entry(entry))
        .collect()
}

fn transform_data(records: &[Record]) -> Vec<Output> {
    let filtered: Vec<&Record> = records.iter()
        .filter(|r| r.is_valid())
        .collect();

    filtered.par_iter()
        .map(|r| transform(r))
        .collect()
}
